translations.landing.pricing.faq.a1: Yes, you can Mise à niveau or downgrade your cloud Forfait at any time. For Hors ligne licenses, you can Mise à niveau by paying the difference.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a3: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans. No questions asked.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a4: Absolutely! The open Source core is MIT licensed. You can use it for any purpose, including commercial projects.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a5: Yes. Flyto2 runs entirely on your computer. Your data never leaves your machine, regardless of which Forfait you're on.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a6: The Gratuit Forfait has generous limits that reset every month. If you reach the limit, you can wait for the Suivant month or Mise à niveau to Pro for unlimited access.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a7: No. The Gratuit Forfait requires no credit card, no Compte and no commitment. Just Télécharger and Démarrer automating.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a8: Desktop Pro runs on your computer — perfect for privacy and Hors ligne use. Cloud plans Ajouter Équipe Fonctionnalités like shared Workflows and collaboration.

translations.landing.pricing.why.feature1Desc: Télécharger and Démarrer using immediately. No sign-up, no credit card, no E-mail verification needed.
translations.landing.pricing.why.feature2Desc: Everything runs on your computer. Your Workflows data, and results never leave your machine.
translations.landing.pricing.why.feature3Desc: The Gratuit Forfait never expires. Use it as long as you want. Mise à niveau only when you need more.
